Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. FFmpeg 8.1 143 upvotes, 22 comments
  2. Show HN: March Madness Bracket Challenge for AI Agents Only 15 upvotes, 0 comments
  3. Kagi Translate now supports LinkedIn Speak as an output language 1161 upvotes, 269 comments
  4. Leanstral: Open-source agent for trustworthy coding and formal proof engineering 680 upvotes, 161 comments
  5. Gummy Geometry 52 upvotes, 7 comments
  6. Enabling Efficient Sparse Computations Using Linear Algebra Aware Compilers 42 upvotes, 5 comments
  7. Building a Shell 116 upvotes, 24 comments
  8. Kagi Small Web 526 upvotes, 145 comments
  9. Finding a CPU Design Bug in the Xbox 360 (2018) 91 upvotes, 19 comments
  10. The unlikely story of Teardown Multiplayer 184 upvotes, 46 comments
  11. Sci-Fi Short Film “There Is No Antimemetics Division” [video] 231 upvotes, 66 comments
  12. Pyodide: a Python distribution based on WebAssembly 150 upvotes, 42 comments
  13. Show HN: Antfly: Distributed, Multimodal Search and Memory and Graphs in Go 27 upvotes, 5 comments
  14. Give Django your time and money, not your tokens 233 upvotes, 86 comments
  15. The “small web” is bigger than you might think 501 upvotes, 207 comments
  16. Meta’s renewed commitment to jemalloc 483 upvotes, 220 comments
  17. Why I love FreeBSD 489 upvotes, 247 comments
  18. Reverse-engineering Viktor and making it Open Source 100 upvotes, 43 comments
  19. Qwen3.5-397B at 4.74 tok/s using 5.9GB RAM 6 upvotes, 0 comments
  20. Microsoft's 'unhackable' Xbox One has been hacked by 'Bliss' 86 upvotes, 38 comments
  21. US SEC preparing to scrap quarterly reporting requirement 682 upvotes, 408 comments
  22. OpenSUSE Kalpa 68 upvotes, 31 comments
  23. Every layer of review makes you 10x slower 428 upvotes, 262 comments
  24. Font Smuggler – copy hidden brand fonts into Google Docs 100 upvotes, 53 comments
  25. What I Learned When I Started a Design Studio (2011) 5 upvotes, 0 comments
  26. A proposal to classify happiness as a psychiatric disorder (1992) 116 upvotes, 66 comments
  27. Ryugu asteroid samples contain all DNA and RNA building blocks 92 upvotes, 63 comments
  28. Node.js needs a virtual file system 73 upvotes, 59 comments
  29. The American Healthcare Conundrum 462 upvotes, 500 comments
  30. Beyond has dropped “meat” from its name and expanded its high-protein drink line 188 upvotes, 465 comments

Last generated 1:00am, 18 March 2026. Source here.
